title: Chunk Payload Schema
description: Schema for a chunk payload stored as a Qdrant point payload.

schema_version.description: Payload schema version. Current value is 1.

doc_id.description: Stable document identifier shared by all chunks of the same document.

url.description: Source location for the document. It may be an external URL, local file URL, or local host address.

section_title.description: Title of the leaf section containing the chunk, if available.

section_path.description: Full section path ordered from top-level section to leaf section.

chunk_index.description: Zero-based chunk order within the document.

page_start.description: First page covered by the chunk.

page_end.description: Last page covered by the chunk. Equal to page_start for single-page chunks.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering or grouping.

content_hash.description: Hash of the text field exactly as stored, without preprocessing or normalization.

chunking_version.description: Version of the chunking logic that produced the chunk.

chunk_created_at.description: Chunk creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

text.description: Chunk text used for embedding and retrieval.

ingest.description: Ingest-time metadata. May be absent before ingest.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model used when the vector was generated.

embedding_model_dimension.description: Embedding vector dimension used when the vector was generated.

ingest_config_version.description: Version of the ingest configuration used during ingest.
